title: Net-New Story Gap Review — 2026-05-15 (HRREC-82977)
content:
Stories (continued 31–36 of 44)

Story Gap score (%) PM lens QA lens XO lens Verdict Suggested missing BDD (Given/When/Then)

HRREC-92008
PH: Agency cannot see recruiter conversation

31% — agency matrix called out
  • Jira — agency matrix — align with security domains and tab visibility siblings.
  • Salomon — (Replay placeholder—not live Salomon excerpts.) If precedent exists for agency submissions, plan tests that cover agency vs direct paths for this ticket.
  • Deployment Agent — (Replay placeholder—not live Deployment Agent answers.) In a live review, ask DA how to stage agency vs direct candidates for this slice.
  • Jira — Add one negative path tied to this summary.
  • Salomon — (Replay placeholder—not live Salomon excerpts.) In a live run, ask Salomon about agency duplicate threads only if this slice owns that risk.

XO MCP — (Replay placeholder—condensed from stub XO text.) Same catalog snapshot as the row above (one epic-wide search in this replay). For HRREC-92008, reconcile agency vs direct predicates with Conversation Message / Recruiting Email bindings this slice assumes. Risk — Same catalog-level risk as rows above—confirm wiring for this key.
  • Finding: No strong cross-lens conflict showed up in this heuristic replay.
  • Recommended next step: Re-read Jira for “Agency user thread list is strictly scoped” on HRREC-92008; if nothing new surfaces, keep scenarios as written.

Beyond Jira — Agency user thread list is strictly scoped
Given An agency recruiter with Modify/Send on conversational email where this slice applies on a tenant staged for this epic, with the 2-way email task and thread chrome described in Jira; Jira’s first *...
When I move between agency vs non-agency tabs or entry points this story owns while the candidate matches both contexts in QA
Then Observable UI, notification, or persisted thread state matches the acceptance criteria for this slice in recruiter-verifiable terms (harden wording under 430 / 319 before sign-off)

Agency vs non-agency predicates
Given the candidate has agency-linked and direct applications (or agency association toggles) as exercised in QA staging
When I open the email task and any tabs or compose entry points this story owns
Then chrome and permissions follow the portfolio rules for each case without thread bleed or misleading empty tabs

HRREC-92010
PH: Recruiter sees tags on messages showing updating state (sent, not delivered)

29% — limited tension in this heuristic pass; lenses largely agree
  • Jira — bounce/complaint telemetry — confirm surfaced strings vs silent drop.
  • Salomon — (Replay placeholder—not live Salomon excerpts.) If support-style threads exist, confirm how this slice surfaces delivery failure in plain recruiter language.
  • Deployment Agent — (Replay placeholder—not live Deployment Agent answers.) In a live review, ask DA which admin toggles mirror common customer misconfiguration for this area.
  • Jira — Add one negative path tied to this summary.
  • Salomon — (Replay placeholder—not live Salomon excerpts.) In a live run, ask Salomon whether bounce copy is visible—not silent.

XO MCP — (Replay placeholder—condensed from stub XO text.) Same catalog snapshot as the row above (one epic-wide search in this replay). For HRREC-92010, relate the catalog hits above to the REST/UI slice in Summary—treat hits as direction, not shipped proof. Risk — Same catalog-level risk as rows above—confirm wiring for this key.
  • Finding: No strong cross-lens conflict showed up in this heuristic replay.
  • Recommended next step: Re-read Jira for “Successful send shows a "Sent" tag” on HRREC-92010; if nothing new surfaces, keep scenarios as written.

Beyond Jira — Successful send shows a "Sent" tag
Given A recruiter with Modify/Send on conversational email where this slice applies on a tenant staged for this epic; Jira’s first *Given* already includes: an email is successfully dispatched from Workd...
When A hard bounce or complaint path fires for a recruiting email in this slice; I open the thread or reporting surfaces Jira names
Then I see the specific failure headline/body or task status Jira promises — not a silent send without surfaced handling

Delivery failure surfaces
Given the integration produces a hard bounce or complaint path the story references
When I review the thread and any notification or reporting surfaces in scope
Then I see the specific status or copy promised (not a silent drop without analytics or suppression alignment)

HRREC-92011
PH: Privacy Admin purges PDTs for 2-way email - Candidate/Job App

33% — limited tension in this heuristic pass; lenses largely agree
  • Jira — purge/privacy — pair UX with Recruiting Communications PDT scope.; notifications — align bell vs My Conversations entry and domain access.; attachments — align client vs server size/type rejection.
  • Salomon — (Replay placeholder—not live Salomon excerpts.) If KB hits mention purge breadth, confirm this story’s UX promises still match what admins can actually remove.
  • Deployment Agent — (Replay placeholder—not live Deployment Agent answers.) In a live review, ask DA how cleanup behaves in a sandbox so the story matches what customers really delete.
  • Jira — Reopen the flow after purge and read the empty state like a recruiter.
  • Salomon — (Replay placeholder—not live Salomon excerpts.) In a live run, search Salomon on this key’s words—not a generic inbox checklist.

XO MCP — (Replay placeholder—condensed from stub XO text.) Same catalog snapshot as the row above (one epic-wide search in this replay). For HRREC-92011, trace purge-related conversation + notification artefacts so UI promises match admin removal scope. Risk — Same catalog-level risk as rows above—confirm wiring for this key.
  • Finding: No strong cross-lens conflict showed up in this heuristic replay.
  • Recommended next step: Re-read Jira for “Successful purge comprehensively remove...” on HRREC-92011; if nothing new surfaces, keep scenarios as written.

Beyond Jira — Successful purge comprehensively removes conversational data
Given A privacy admin on a tenant staged for this epic, with the 2-way email task and thread chrome described in Jira; Jira’s first *Given* already includes: an eligible candidate or job application is t...
When A privacy admin completes the purge or retention action this story depends on for the candidate/application context in Jira
Then Purged content stays absent from the 2-way email task, thread lists, and conversational notifications this story references

Privacy purge or retention edge
Given a privacy admin has purged or constrained retained recruiting communications artefacts for this application per policy
When I reopen the thread after purge completes
Then I see the documented empty or no-retained-messages state and purged content does not reappear via notifications or caches
